utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Listen , I am sorry about that whole thing with Roger .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I am sorry about that whole thing with Roger .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: It really was not right , and I , and I want to make it up to you , so umm , I brought you something that I think you will really enjoy .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Now , this is just a loan .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am gonna , I am gonna want him back .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So ... I am gonna go now .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I am sorry , I thought I could do it and I can not !

emotion_cause.span: 8_I thought I could do it and I can not !
